title: Access, Assessment and Continuity of Care
description: Access, Assessment and Continuity of Care standards focusing on the patient entry, evaluation, and transition of care.

title: Care of Patients
description: Care of Patients standards governing general clinical care, special care, and patient management procedures.

title: Management of Medication
description: Management of Medication standards covering drug procurement, safe storage, prescribing, dispensing, and administration.

title: Patient Rights and Education
description: Patient Rights and Education standards ensuring respect for patient autonomy, informed consent, and health education.

title: Infection Prevention and Control
description: Infection Prevention and Control standards outlining policies and structures to minimize healthcare-associated infections.

title: Patient Safety and Quality Improvement
description: Patient Safety and Quality Improvement standards focusing on continuous monitoring, incident tracking, and clinical outcomes.

title: Responsibility of Management
description: Responsibility of Management standards defining administrative governance, leadership, and ethical responsibilities.

title: Facility Management and Safety
description: Facility Management and Safety standards covering physical infrastructure, equipment safety, and emergency systems.

title: Human Resource Management
description: Human Resource Management standards directing staff recruitment, credentialing, training, performance, and health.

title: Information Management System
description: Information Management System standards ensuring data confidentiality, security, record audits, and regulatory compliance.
